projectStack: React, Vite, Vite, Express.js, JWT Authentication, Password Hashing (bcrypt)

issuesFound.description: The application requires 4 environment variables but no .env file exists.
The application uses MongoDB. Ensure it's running and accessible.
issuesFound.fixCommand: Start MongoDB service or use Docker

setupSteps: Navigate to client folder: cd client
Create server/.env file with required variables
Start server: npm run dev (in server folder)
Start client: npm run dev (in client folder, new terminal)
